# Hatchet Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    hatchet = {
      source  = "hatchet-dev/hatchet"
      version = "~> 0.1.0"
    }
  }
}

provider "hatchet" {
  # JWT is read from HATCHET_CLOUD_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN environment variable
  # or specify it here (not recommended for production)
  # token = "eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIs..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `token` (String, Sensitive) Management token for the Hatchet Cloud instance. Can also be provided via HATCHET_CLOUD_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN environment variable.
